apsNote: Medicine closes 31 May. Some faculties close as early as 30 April.
requiredDocuments: Certified copy of South African ID or valid passport
Certified copy of matric certificate or statement of results
Proof of residence (not older than 3 months)

internationalStudents.note: International applicants require SAQA evaluation of qualifications.

applicationFee.note: R100 domestic; R400 international; Quintile 1-4 exempt

apsSystem: NSC aggregate % (best 6 subjects excl. Life Orientation) — SU uses percentage aggregate out of 100, not APS /42

flags: SU uses NSC aggregate percentage (not the /42 APS scale) — aps values in programmes represent minimum NSC aggregate % thresholds, not APS points
healthSciencesCloses: MBChB and Health Sciences close 31 July like all programmes; no earlier health-sciences-specific date confirmed from official sources for 2027
Military Science (Faculty) undergraduate programmes are exclusively for SANDF personnel — not open to civilian applicants; no civilian admission requirements exist

feeSA exemption: quintile 1–4 school applicants are exempt from the R100 fee; international fee R400 confirmed from secondary sources citing official SU pages, not directly from su.ac.za (403 on application-fees page)
Enrolment figure of ~32 000 is approximate; Wikipedia cites 25 042 undergraduates and 10 051 postgraduates (total ~35 093) as of most recent data
